meaning: v.咕噜咕噜叫,发出喉音n.咕噜咕噜声
examples: The units are the same as the time base register and the sum of the PURR values for both threads is equal to time base register.
Carmela heard the purr of a motorcycle coming up the drive.
It could purr along like any luxury car or, at a press of the ubiquitous sport button, growl loudly as you disappear down the road.
When this woman pleads, it's with a deep, rich purr that recalls Joan Greenwood.
Think wines with spiced black fruits, velvety rims, tannins that purr and a backbone of peppery spice.
